03 / history

Experience

2022 — now
Senior Software Engineer
Vercel · Remote
Led architecture of the Edge Runtime caching layer, reducing cold starts by 60%. Mentored 4 junior engineers and drove adoption of TypeScript strict mode across the codebase.
2020 — 2022
Software Engineer
Stripe · San Francisco
Built internal tooling for fraud detection pipelines processing 2M+ transactions/day. Maintained Go microservices and contributed to Stripe's developer dashboard in React.
2018 — 2020
Frontend Developer
Startup Studio · Jakarta
Shipped MVPs for 8 startups across fintech and logistics. Primary stack: React, Node, and PostgreSQL. Introduced automated testing, cutting production bugs by 40%.
